person_name: Palladius, Master of the Ceremonies under Constantius Gallus (4th century) (pagan)
person_name_full: Palladius, Master of the Ceremonies under Constantius Gallus (4th century) (pagan)

docs.title: Letter 194
docs.author: Libanius
docs.excerpt: His personal charm, his sociable nature, his way of immediately attracting whomever he meets, the fact that he is himself a festival when no festival is on and makes any festival greater when there is one -- this you will perhaps find in no one else, and certainly not in many.
